name: waltz
description: Waltz - 家計簿Webアプリケーション

scripts.api:copy-types: cp shared/types.ts api/src/types.ts || copy shared\types.ts api\src\types.ts
scripts.api:push: npm run api:copy-types && cd api && npx clasp push
scripts.api:deploy: npm run api:copy-types && cd api && npx clasp push && npx clasp deploy -i $DEPLOYMENT_ID
